sections.content: Design thinking is an innovative approach to resolve complex business problems by using its ‘human centred approach’. It helps organisations to differentiate & provide a competitive edge in market. Each steps of design thinking provokes & helps you to define better solutions and experiences, taking customer centricity into account. This approach is extremely helpful for organisations that are facing challenges at micro or macro level. Companies like IBM, Apple, Airbnb, P&G have reaped financial benefits after adopting this approach.

content: Understand Design thinking its key concepts and principles
Develop design thinking mindset to approach challenges
Understand design thinking steps – defining problem statement, ideating, prototyping &testing your product before launching
Practice design thinking through brainstorming and lateral thinking in teams
Learn skills to become an effective designer
Learn how to apply design thinking steps to make product that delight your customer by engaging in empathetic interactions
